title: Assam Sees 75 pc Polling Till 4.30 pm; Keralam 62.71 pc, Puducherry 72.40 pc
description: In Assam, more than 2.5 crore electors are eligible to exercise their franchise for the 126-member legislative assembly. There are 722 candidates in the fray. Of 2,50,54,463 electors, 1,25,31,552 are male voters and 1,25,22,593 females
